title: Research Harness Pack (Claude Code plugin)
description: A pack IS a Claude Code plugin (SPEC §7b): a self-contained bundle of flat skills/, agents/, commands/, and hooks/ under .claude-plugin/plugin.json. This schema validates that plugin.json plus the harness-local fields that classify the pack and namespace its skills.

name.description: Pack name; also the skill namespace (skills resolve as pack:skill).

kind.description: The pack taxonomy (SPEC §7b table): methodology adds dimensions/analyst skills; genre adds deliverable templates; channel adds render adapters; ontology adds MIF entity/relationship/trait extensions.

provides.description: What the pack contributes to the core; every entry is namespaced so it never collides with core skills.
